sentence: Lapho esePoland, uDennis walujabulela kakhulu uhambo kunoJason ngoba _ wayengaluqondi kahle ulimi lwesi Pholishi.
UMichael wayenemali eningi kunoSamuel ngoba _ uthanda ukuthenga nokusebenzisa imali kakhulu.
UMonica usijabulela ngempela isiphuzo sevodka, kodwa uFelicia uthanda uwiski ngoba _ uthanda uphuzo oludakayo.
USamantha wehlulekile esivivinyweni kodwa uMary wathola imiphumela emahle kakhulu ngoba _ wayevilapha kakhulu.
UKayla wasusa isitho sangasese sekati lakhe elisha lokutholwa kodwa hhayi uElena ngoba _ wayenomuzwa wokuthi linonya.
Isitolo asebenza kuso uJason sinezinambitheka eziningi kunesitolo sikaDennis ngoba _ kuhlala kumatasa.
UCarrie akazange amnake uTanya, ngoba _ wayengemuhle ekugqameni ezindaweni zomphakathi.
